name: Starry Globe Kids' Nightlight - Pillowfort™
description: Bring the beauty of the night sky into your little one's room with the Starry Globe Nightlight from Pillowfort™. This globe nightlight features star-shaped cutouts that, when lit, cast glowing stars on nearby surfaces for a beautiful, hypnotic effect. Perfect for comforting children who are afraid of the dark, this nightlight also provides a lovely decorative accent for their bedroom.
